description.value:
Special: Blast (3), Smoke (3)

Note: Any psyker struck by the attack, caught within the blast, or entering the smoke cloud before it dissipates must pass a Very Hard (-30) Willpower test or lose 1 Psy Rating per degree of failure. If the psyker fails by two or more degrees of failure, he must also immediately roll Psychic Phenomena. Lost Psy Rating returns at 1 point every 6 hours, and any attempt to manifest a psychic power from within the cloud automatically fails.

system.notes: Any psyker struck by the attack, caught within the blast, or entering the smoke cloud before it dissipates must pass a Very Hard (-30) Willpower test or lose 1 Psy Rating per degree of failure. If the psyker fails by two or more degrees of failure, he must also immediately roll Psychic Phenomena. Lost Psy Rating returns at 1 point every 6 hours, and any attempt to manifest a psychic power from within the cloud automatically fails.
